# AMCOL Industrial

AMCOL Industrial supplies industrial, marine, safety, maintenance, MRO, and facility products in Trinidad & Tobago.

Website: https://amcolindustrial.com
Catalog: https://amcolindustrial.com/products
Knowledge Center: https://amcolindustrial.com/knowledge
Contact: https://amcolindustrial.com/contact

Known business signals:
- Name: AMCOL Industrial
- Location: 22 Ramjohn Trace, Penal, Trinidad & Tobago
- Phone: +1 868 288 5800
- Email: sales@amcolindustrial.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 7:00 AM-5:00 PM

Primary product areas:
- Safety and PPE
- Cleaners and degreasers
- Lubricants
- Adhesives, sealants, and tape
- Fire protection
- Pipes, valves, and fittings
- HVAC chemicals
- Welding, ladders, marine, and maintenance supplies

Knowledge topics:
- Industrial safety and PPE selection
- Marine maintenance and port supply planning
- Lubricants, anti-seize, and corrosion control
- Bearings, pumps, valves, welding, electrical safety, construction supplies, fire protection, industrial chemicals, and material handling
